Implementation Action: Verify that EEEEE media marking records and supporting documents demonstrate compliance with the control

Implementation Action: Document EEEEE’s media storage procedure for removable digital media and paper or microfilm records

Implementation Action: Ensure EEEEE media is physically controlled through a check-out, return, and inventory process

Implementation Action: Store EEEEE media only within the designated controlled media library areas
Action Detail: Keep digital media in the CML vault and non-digital media in the CML document room, using the required badge-controlled and locked storage arrangements for the asset’s media classification.

Implementation Action: Verify that EEEEE media remains protected until destroyed or sanitised using approved equipment, techniques, and procedures
Action Detail: Confirm that the team’s handling process only releases media after approved destruction or sanitisation has been completed and recorded.

Implementation Action: Locate the Enterprise system media protection policy and procedures for EEEEE and confirm the application’s media storage arrangements comply with them
Action Detail: Map the application’s media storage areas and handling arrangements to the inherited enterprise policy, procedures, and system security plan requirements.

Implementation Action: Document EEEEE media storage areas and the authorised access control devices used at each external entry
Action Detail: Record the physical media storage locations supporting EEEEE and specify the keypad and card reader controls used to restrict entry.

Action Detail: Apply the approved access list to the external entries for the media storage areas used by EEEEE.

Implementation Action: Verify EEEEE transport arrangements restrict media movement to authorised personnel and preserve accountability

Implementation Action: Document EEEEE’s procedure for identifying an unambiguous custodian before system media is transported outside controlled areas

Implementation Action: Document EEEEE media sanitisation and disposal procedures for all system media handled by the application team

Implementation Action: Record sanitisation evidence for EEEEE media disposal, release, and reuse events

Implementation Action: Verify that EEEEE operational staff follow the approved media sanitisation procedure before any media is disposed of, released from organisational control, or reused
